'''Xaza IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Xan sector/Legends|Xan sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Around [[3 ABY/Legends|3.5 ABY]], an exquisite oil-burning chandelier owned by [[Rithgar]], the master of the [[Kothlis shadowport|Kothlis Shadowport]] came from this planet.<ref name="NE">{{WEGCite|story=Hasty Exit|book=Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Hasty Exit|book=Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook}} {{1stm}}
